EvidenceRule: ROC/Youden threshold for reliable-position label using q_pos >= threshold.
Note: Reliable label: low position sigma, low DOP, high satellite count.

EvidenceRule: ROC/Youden threshold for degraded-position label using q_pos <= threshold.
Note: Degraded label: high position sigma, high DOP, or low satellite count.

EvidenceRule: ROC/Youden threshold for high-blockage label using blind_zone >= threshold.
Note: High-blockage label: NLOS, PDR <= 0.70, or delay exceeds deadline.

EvidenceRule: Lower-quartile position-risk level among degraded-position samples.
Note: This controls when protection demand starts increasing from position risk.

EvidenceRule: Lower-quartile excess-blindness level among high-blockage samples.
Note: This controls when protection demand starts increasing from blind-zone risk.
